---
title: "Maria Elizabeth Hutchinson"
---

## Maria Elizabeth Hutchinson

**Dates:** (1832/3-1869)

**Maiden name:** (Latham)

### Description

stepsister of Margaret Eliza Roberts and sister of Diana Latham

### Biography

She married (1851) the Rev. Charles Henry Hutchinson (1823/4-1896), Vicar of West Dean, Sussex, and had at least eight children.

### Letters

- Letter from June 1st 1868

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
